segments.text: Every wine brand tries to look fancy,
but this brand put real life criminals
on their bottles. This sounds like a
terrible idea, but it turned them into a
massive milliondoll brand. Meet 19
crimes. Instead of a boring logo, every
bottle features an old mug shot of a
actual criminal. But why would you try
to sell wine using criminals? Because
it's a true story. [music] Hundreds of
years ago, Britain punished people by
shipping them off to Australia for 19
specific crimes. But still, why do
people connect? Because these people
were not just bad guys. They were
survivors. They survived a brutal
punishment and literally built the
country of Australia from scratch.
[music]
The brand isn't just selling wine.
They're selling a feeling of pure
rebellion. And as a crazy bonus, if you
point your phone at the bottle, the
picture actually comes alive and tell
you their story. For more hidden
designs, subscribe.
